description: Comprehensive Elasticsearch monitoring dashboard covering node resources, cluster health, index statistics, and query/request performance. Uses metrics from the OpenTelemetry Elasticsearch receiver.
title: Elasticsearch Monitoring Dashboard

c44662d3-7119-484b-8bcf-44f71eae5287.name: elasticsearch.node.name
c44662d3-7119-484b-8bcf-44f71eae5287.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'elasticsearch.node.name') AS `elasticsearch.node.name`
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name = 'elasticsearch.node.open_files'
GROUP BY `elasticsearch.node.name`

widgets.description: Total disk space available to the node filesystem.
widgets.title: Node Disk Total

widgets.title: Node Disk Free

widgets.title: Node Disk Available

widgets.description: OS-level CPU usage percentage for the Elasticsearch node.

widgets.description: Amount of JVM heap memory currently in use.
widgets.title: JVM Heap Memory Used

widgets.description: Amount of JVM non-heap memory currently in use (code cache, metaspace, etc.).
widgets.title: JVM Non-Heap Memory Used

widgets.description: Current health status of the cluster (green/yellow/red).
widgets.title: Cluster Health Status

widgets.description: Number of ongoing shard info requests.
widgets.title: In-Flight Fetches

widgets.description: Number of active (non-deleted) documents per index.
widgets.title: Index Document Count

widgets.description: Estimated disk space used by index shards.

widgets.description: Rate of query operations completed per second.

widgets.description: Rate of indexing operations completed per second.

widgets.description: Time spent performing index operations.
